scope.target: Resolve D1-D9 before canonical repository rules are changed
constraints: Do not infer unresolved architecture direction
Record the reason and impact of each approved decision
Mark intentionally postponed decisions as deferred

inputs.architecture_target: Approved repository, query, persistence, transaction, deletion, and validation contract
user_constraints: Avoid later correction errors by asking for decisions first

steps: Present D1-D9 with recommended defaults and tradeoffs
Update target direction and downstream task constraints
Mark deferred decisions and their blocked scope
validation: Every decision has an explicit state
Downstream tasks reference the approved direction
No contradiction remains between selected decisions
